title: Choong Lee Aun (Choong) — Criminal Prosecution (2025)
text:
Nature of offence: Causing wrongful loss to a listed corporation 

 [section 317A(1) of the CMSA]

Offender(s): Choong Lee Aun (Choong)

Facts: Choong, formerly Managing Director of AT Systematization Berhad ("ATS") (now known as Erdasan Group Berhad) was charged with 41 charges of causing wrongful loss to ATS. He is alleged to have caused ATS to transfer payments totalling RM16.35 million to Delta Million Dynamic Sdn Bhd and Midas Mode Sdn Bhd with the intention of causing wrongful loss to ATS. 

 The offences occurred between June 2020 and November 2021.

Outcome: Choong was charged in the Kuala Lumpur Sessions Court on 8 October 2025.
